missions.title: Structural Organisation in Animals and Plants - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering root morphology, stem morphology, leaf morphology and more.

microtargets.title: Root morphology
mustKnowFacts: Root morphology is a fundamental subtopic of Structural Organisation in Animals and Plants.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Root morphology for NEET.

commonLabelTraps: Confusing Part A with Part B in root morphology

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Root morphology during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Root morphology.
masteryCriteria: Can accurately solve numericals or identify structures related to Root morphology.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Root morphology.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain the core concept behind Root morphology.
